scope: Tauri 2 Linux GTK/WebKit transitive dependencies in Open Studio desktop shells
policy: The platform Cargo workspace must pass cargo-audit with no ignores. Tauri desktop lockfiles may temporarily ignore GTK3/WebKit ecosystem advisories only when every ignored advisory is transitive through Tauri/Wry, documented here, and re-reviewed before the expiry date.

accepted.reason: Transitive macro dependency from the Tauri Linux GTK3 stack. No direct AuraOne runtime API consumes proc-macro-error.
accepted.mitigation: Keep the desktop shell pinned to current Tauri 2 releases, block direct dependencies on proc-macro-error, and re-audit when Tauri/Wry publish a GTK4/WebKitGTK replacement path.

accepted.reason: Linux-only GTK3 binding pulled by Tauri/Wry for system webview integration.
accepted.mitigation: No direct AuraOne calls into GTK bindings; Linux releases remain subject to clean-machine smoke tests and Tauri update review.

accepted.reason: Linux-only GTK3 binding pulled by Tauri/Wry for system webview integration.
accepted.mitigation: No direct AuraOne calls into GTK bindings; Linux releases remain subject to clean-machine smoke tests and Tauri update review.

accepted.reason: Linux-only GTK3 accessibility binding pulled by Tauri/Wry.
accepted.mitigation: Do not expose custom unsafe GTK/ATK code in AuraOne shell crates; require accessibility smoke checks on Linux release candidates.

accepted.reason: Linux-only X11 GTK binding pulled by Tauri/Wry.
accepted.mitigation: Linux release builds are audited as system-webview shells and must not add direct GTK/X11 calls outside Tauri.

accepted.reason: Linux-only GTK3 binding pulled by Tauri/Wry.
accepted.mitigation: Track upstream Tauri/Wry migration path; no AuraOne code may depend directly on gtk 0.18 APIs.

accepted.reason: Linux-only GTK3 accessibility sys binding pulled by Tauri/Wry.
accepted.mitigation: No direct sys crate usage is allowed; release smoke tests cover Linux accessibility and startup.

accepted.reason: Linux-only X11 GTK binding pulled by Tauri/Wry.
accepted.mitigation: No direct AuraOne dependency; re-evaluate after each Tauri minor upgrade.

accepted.reason: Linux-only GTK3 sys binding pulled by Tauri/Wry.
accepted.mitigation: No direct sys crate usage is allowed; keep Linux sandbox permissions constrained by Tauri capabilities.

accepted.reason: Linux-only GTK3 macro crate pulled by Tauri/Wry.
accepted.mitigation: No direct macro usage in AuraOne code; re-audit when upstream removes GTK3 binding chain.

accepted.reason: Linux-only GTK3 sys binding pulled by Tauri/Wry.
accepted.mitigation: No direct sys crate usage is allowed; Linux release candidates run isolated shell smoke tests.

accepted.reason: Unsound iterator implementation in a transitive Linux GTK/WebKit binding; AuraOne code does not call the affected iterator API directly.
accepted.mitigation: Block direct glib usage in AuraOne shell code and require Tauri/Wry update review before GA Linux artifacts.

accepted.reason: Transitive unmaintained Unicode helper used by Tauri URL pattern parsing.
accepted.mitigation: No direct dependency; monitor Tauri URL pattern updates and keep tauri-utils pinned to current minor releases.
